title: The Colloquy of the Ancients
description: The last surviving Fianna warriors meet St. Patrick and recount the tales of pagan Ireland.
introduction: The last surviving Fianna warriors meet St. Patrick and recount the tales of pagan Ireland.

translation.original_text: Cailte mac Ronáin is Oisín mac Finn, ba díb rofágbad.
translation.text: Cailte son of Ronan and Oisin son of Fionn — these were the ones who remained.
